description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof and a minimalist architectural style. The structure features large glass windows and sliding doors, providing ample natural light and seamless indoor-outdoor transitions. The front includes a driveway, a garage, and landscaped greenery with trees and shrubs. The backyard is equipped with a swimming pool and a patio area, surrounded by privacy trees. The exterior walls are finished in light-colored concrete or stucco, complemented by wooden and metallic accents. The layout is open-plan, with visible living, dining, and bedroom spaces arranged for functional flow.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large glass windows, landscaped gardens, and a backyard pool.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, garage, main entrance, and landscaped front yard with trees and shrubs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage, side windows, and a clear view of the backyard pool and patio area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, swimming pool, patio, and dense tree line for privacy.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side entrance, additional windows, and the transition from front to backyard.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and sliding glass doors
